LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_mini.label: basic-density hydroponics bay
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_mini.description: An entry-tier dense hydroponics bay that fits 16 plants into a 1x4 footprint, providing roughly four times the growing area of ordinary planting in the same space. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics.label: high-density hydroponics bay
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics.description: An industrial dense hydroponics bay that supports 80 plants in a 2x4 footprint, providing roughly ten times the growing area of ordinary planting in the same space. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_Hyper.label: ultra-density hydroponics bay
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_Hyper.description: An advanced ultra-dense hydroponics bay built for large indoor farms, packing 240 plants into a 2x6 footprint and providing roughly twenty times the growing area of ordinary planting in the same space. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_Quantum.label: quantum-density hydroponics bay
LanguageData.HDH_Hydroponics_Quantum.description: A spacer-grade quantum hydroponics chamber that folds multiple grow layers into a compact 2x2 footprint. Its capacity scales upward with available power, and it can enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost while still ignoring ordinary temperature limits.
